text: A sales and use tax is imposed on items sold on district property.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.351 — Tax Authorized

A sales and use tax is imposed on items sold on district property.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A sales and use tax is imposed on items sold on district property.
